headline: Ofwat confirms £44.7m enforcement package for Welsh Water
body: Ofwat has confirmed a £44.7m enforcement package for Welsh Water. The money will reduce spills and improve river water quality. It is funded by the company, not customers.
why_matters: Signals tougher AMP8 enforcement — relevant to regulatory-readiness work.

headline: National Grid told to approve £4.5bn transmission spend
body: National Grid says the money is needed to invest in the network over five years.

headline: BT CEO on why telecoms needs more strikers
body: BT's chief executive sets out a growth strategy in a wide-ranging interview.

headline: Informa lifts full-year guidance on events strength
body: Informa raised guidance citing strong live-events demand.
